CONTENT.Club career: In 2019, Kosznovszky signed for Italian Serie A side Parma, where he made one appearance. On 22 May 2021, he debuted for Parma during a 3–0 loss to Sampdoria.In 2021, Kosznovszky signed for MTK in the Hungarian top flight. Before the second half of 2021–22, he was sent on loan to Hungarian second tier club Tiszakécske. For the 2022–23 season, Kosznovszky was loaned to the second tier once again, this time to Kozármisleny.
CONTENT.International career: Kosznovszky represented Hungary at the 2019 UEFA European Under-17 Championship and the 2019 FIFA U-17 World Cup.

SUMMARY: Márk Kosznovszky (born 17 April 2002) is a Hungarian footballer who plays as a midfielder for MTK Budapest.
